data.description: Your Vision-Language-Action Model Already Has Attention Heads For Path Deviation Detection uses or builds on Aluminum-Magnesium Alloy for Humanoid Robot Lightweight Structure.
Aluminum-magnesium alloys are reported to be used in Tesla Optimus-Gen2 limb skeletons, contributing to weight reduction while maintaining rigidity.
